name: Planner Skill Eval Suite
description: Tests the planner skill's ability to produce structured implementation plans

cases.name: add-cli-args
cases.task: Add non-interactive CLI argument parsing to bin/omni.js so it supports subcommands like 'omni skills list' and 'omni eval <skill>'
cases.judgePrompt: Rate this implementation plan from 0 to 10. A good plan should: (1) identify specific files to modify, (2) describe changes in order, (3) mention backward compatibility with the existing REPL, (4) be actionable without ambiguity.

cases.name: error-handling
cases.task: Improve error handling in the agent adapters (src/agents/claude.js and src/agents/codex.js) to include timeouts, retry logic, and structured error types
cases.judgePrompt: Rate this implementation plan from 0 to 10. A good plan should cover timeout configuration, retry strategies with backoff, and specific error types. Deduct points for vague or hand-wavy suggestions.

cases.name: add-new-route
cases.task: Add a new '@status' route to the REPL that shows the health of configured agents (whether claude and codex CLIs are installed and responsive)
cases.judgePrompt: Rate this implementation plan from 0 to 10. A good plan should identify where to add the route, how to check agent health, and how to display results. It should integrate with the existing route system.
